statement:
A library uses the following rules for borrowing limits:

Rule 1: Standard members may borrow up to 3 books at a time.
Rule 2: Premium members may borrow up to 7 books at a time.
Rule 3: Any member with an overdue book cannot borrow additional books until the overdue book is returned.
Rule 4: Children (age 12 or under) may only borrow from the children's section.

Kael is a premium member, age 15, currently has 5 books checked out, and none are overdue. Can Kael borrow 2 more books from the adult section? Answer yes or no and state which rule(s) determine the answer.
constraints: All relevant rules must be cited
acceptableVariants: yes, rule 2 allows up to 7 and kael has 5 so 2 more is within limit
